mode-toggle: display: flex; background: var(--surface-1); border: 1px solid var(--divider); border-radius: 999px; padding: 3px;
mode-seg: font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 999px; color: var(--text-secondary);
user-msg: align-self: flex-end; max-width: 78%; background: var(--surface-1); color: var(--text); font-size: 16px; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 20px 20px 6px 20px; line-height: 1.45;
cursor: display: inline-block; color: var(--text); animation: blink 1.06s steps(1) infinite;
cite-av: width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #3A3F44, #1E2126); flex-shrink: 0;
cite-x: margin-left: auto; color: var(--text-secondary); font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px;
cite-foot: display: flex; gap: 20px; margin-top: 10px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 12px;
prompt-bar: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: var(--surface-1); border: 1px solid var(--divider); border-radius: 24px; padding: 8px 8px 8px 12px;
send-btn: width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--accent-white); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0;
